name: PressPilot — Publish Scheduler

nodes.name: Daily 10AM Publish Trigger
nodes.notes: Runs daily at 10AM. Change cron expression to adjust frequency.

nodes.name: Publish Post
nodes.notes: Ghost requires updated_at to be sent with PUT requests to prevent conflict errors.

notes: Publishes oldest N drafts per domain daily at 10AM. Set PUBLISH_LIMIT_PER_DOMAIN in the Load Domain Config node. Disable this workflow to use fully manual publishing (approve from Ghost admin). Sends Telegram notification on each publish.
